name: Individual Carrot-Pork Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Micro-cook carrot, onion, and 2 tablespoons water in a microwave-safe dish on high power for about 1 1/2 minutes or until tender. Drain excess liquid.
2. Stir in the beaten egg, bread crumbs, oregano, salt (to taste), and a dash of freshly ground pepper. Mix well.
3. Gradually add the ground pork, mixing thoroughly to combine all ingredients.
4. Shape the mixture into two individual loaves and place them in a shallow baking dish.
5. Microwave, loosely covered, on high power for 4 to 5 minutes or until no longer pink. Turn the loaves a quarter turn and allow excess fat to drain off every 2 minutes.
6. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese over the top of each loaf.
7. Continue microwaving, uncovered, on high power for an additional 45 seconds to 1 1/2 minutes or until the cheese is melted. Serve hot.
